item.title: Professional File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Is user worried that how to restore all deleted data into original form? Just visit website www.pendriverecovery.org that allows user for downloading corrupted data restoration utility that retrieves all important office documents that lost due to human mistake. Most comprehensive and affordable Professional File Recovery Software revives all data and save into different file format including TIFF, GIFF, RIFF, JPG, JPEG, MPG, MPEG and many others. Amazing data recovery software regains damaged audio from mp3/mp4 players.

[read more]

Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Is user worried that how to restore all deleted data into original form? Just visit website www.pendriverecovery.org that allows user for downloading corrupted data restoration utility that retrieves all important office documents that lost due to human mistake. Most comprehensive and affordable Professional File Recovery Software revives all data and save into different file format including TIFF, GIFF, RIFF, JPG, JPEG, MPG, MPEG and many others. Amazing data recovery software regains damaged audio from mp3/mp4 players.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Is user worried that how to restore all deleted data into original form? Just visit website www.pendriverecovery.org that allows user for downloading corrupted data restoration utility that retrieves all important office documents that lost due to human mistake. Most comprehensive and affordable Professional File Recovery Software revives all data and save into different file format including TIFF, GIFF, RIFF, JPG, JPEG, MPG, MPEG and many others. Amazing data recovery software regains damaged audio from mp3/mp4 players.

[read more]

item.title: Nextcloud - AppImage [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Nextcloud - AppImage [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: calupoh
item.itunes:summary:
Nextcloud - AppImage
(Utilities)
Official application to synchronize your Nextcloud.
Note: I am not the developer, I am just uploading the file which you can download from the official site.
[read more]

item.title: GimpSplasher [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: GimpSplasher [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
GimpSplasher
(Graphic Apps)
Change gimp's splash
This program allow you to change gimp's splash screen
Add one or multiple splash images
Works for Gimp's current version 2.10 or greater
[read more]
item.description:

(Graphic Apps)
Change gimp's splash
This program allow you to change gimp's splash screen
Add one or multiple splash images
Works for Gimp's current version 2.10 or greater

(Graphic Apps)
Change gimp's splash
This program allow you to change gimp's splash screen
Add one or multiple splash images
Works for Gimp's current version 2.10 or greater

item.title: ddCopy [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ddCopy [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
ddCopy
(Utilities)
ddCopy writes bootable iso image files
* Makes a bootable CD/DVD
* Makes a bootable USB key
* Formats a USB key
[read more]
item.description:
ddCopy
(Utilities)
ddCopy writes bootable iso image files

* Makes a bootable USB key
* Formats a USB key

item.title: Inxi Gui [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Inxi Gui [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Inxi Gui
(Utilities)
Inxi gui shows system hardware, CPU, drivers, Xorg, Desktop, kernel, GCC version,
processes, RAM usage and more...

item.title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: MATE Random Background [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]
item.description:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MATE Random Background
(Graphic Apps)
Simple background changer for MATE
Make changes to your desktop in desired time intervals.
Just add your favorite pics in your ~/Wallpapers folder

With the notify icon menu you can make changes on the fly
or from selected intervals.
Supports: png, jpg, jpeg, gif and bmp images
Supports: Multiple work spaces on the desktop
[read more]

item.title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: CopyCat [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.description:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
CopyCat
(Utilities)
CopyCat allows you boot most Debian live iso's, including Ubuntu,
Mint, Devuan, Peppermint and other Debian live iso's with persistence
to save changes to a usb key device. It can also be used to put your own
snapshot of Debian based iso's on a usb key or removable device.
Optional live installer included for all linux bootable iso's

Persistence tested and works with:
Debian-live-releases (all), Deepin, Elementary, Freespire, Kali, Linux-lite,
Linuxmint, Peppermint, Pop-os, Ubuntu-releases (all), Devuan (all),
Sparky (all), MX, Bodhi, Feren, Nitrux, Usu, Extix, Trisquel and Zorin


Tested not working: Siduction, Endless-os, Pure-os


[read more]

item.title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Click Radio [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.description:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer

* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Click Radio
(Audioplayers)
Click Radio is lightweight and simple gui interface media app
project of mine as to be very easy to use.
Click and play features:
* Music radio streamer
* Streamripper recorder
* Plays local music files
* Creates a music playlist
* CD-ROM music player
* CD-R music burner
* Youtube media downloader

Tested and works on MATE, Cinnamon, Budgie, KDE Plasma, and XFCE desktop
Will not work on or show notification menu on Gnome3 desktop

[read more]

item.title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: COOLWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]
item.description:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
COOLWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The CoolWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance your mobile gaming experience by effectively mitigating overheating issues. This module seamlessly integrates with the Magisk framework, allowing you to optimize your device's performance and maintain a cooler temperature while gaming.
By employing a range of innovative techniques, CoolWing works diligently in the background to prevent your device from reaching critical heat levels during extended gaming sessions. It achieves this by intelligently managing CPU and GPU frequencies, optimizing resource allocation, and fine-tuning thermal management settings.

CoolWing's primary objective is to ensure that your device remains cool under pressure, thus preventing thermal throttling and allowing you to fully immerse yourself in your favorite games without worrying about performance degradation due to overheating. It's a must-have for mobile gamers seeking to unlock the full potential of their devices while keeping temperatures at bay.
[read more]
